'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=jFaax54k1NP8M_CVxxc.jNf6AC.LalEV1UxFD9Tw_3g-1774154869-1.0.1.1-4CnKZWnw1xsp52lTmp2RDM01zPBroWk75gNpdoC.OpY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
